errors.PACK_SCHEMA_UNKNOWN_FIELD: pack.json contains unknown top-level field when additionalProperties=false.
errors.BUNDLE_SCHEMA_UNKNOWN_FIELD: bundle.json contains unknown top-level field when additionalProperties=false.
errors.BUNDLE_FILE_LOGICAL_KEY_MISSING: bundle logical key not present in pack files map.
errors.BUNDLE_FILE_HASH_MISMATCH: bundle declared hash does not match referenced file.
errors.BUNDLE_SIGNATURE_FORMAT_INVALID: obt.jws is not a valid compact JWS payload.
errors.BUNDLE_SIGNATURE_ALG_UNSUPPORTED: JWS alg is unsupported for OCI-1 baseline.
errors.BUNDLE_SIGNATURE_PAYLOAD_MISMATCH: JWS payload does not equal bundle.json.
errors.OVL_CANONICAL_MISMATCH: Overlay precedence references are inconsistent with files map or deny-wins constraints.
errors.CASE_PATH_MISSING: Fixture case path does not exist.
